question: Does the appreciation model generalize beyond the qualities it was trained on?

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.setup: Hold qualities out of TRAINING; test whether the model can produce a valid appreciation for them (--holdout).

attempts.name: word tokenizer, seed only
attempts.why: Held-out word embeddings get no gradient; a tied-embedding model can't emit them.

attempts.name: word + vocabulary warm-up
attempts.why: Growing embeddings wasn't enough; no copy head formed.

attempts.name: char tokenizer
attempts.why: Fixed emittability (perfect in-distribution) but still no copy head — it generates from its learned quality distribution instead of copying the cue. Sharpened the diagnosis.

attempts.name: char + copy-augmentation (8k nonces, length 4-9)
attempts.why: Forcing the model to copy meaningless nonce strings INDUCED the copy head; short held-out qualities copied verbatim. Misses were char-copy errors on LONG words (the nonces were too short).

attempts.name: char + copy-augmentation (12k nonces, length 3-15 to match real quality lengths)
attempts.why: Matching nonce lengths to the real quality-length distribution let the copy head handle long strings. Zero-shot jumped to 89%: long held-out qualities now copy verbatim (vision, transparency, trustworthiness, thoughtfulness, understanding). The residual ~11% are occasional char slips on the hardest words (willingness -> 'willivness', vigilance -> 'vigilkgxlknce').

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.honest_conclusion: Zero-shot generalization to never-trained qualities reached 89% (from 0%), achieved by copy-augmentation that induces a copy head, with nonce lengths matched to the target distribution. The remaining gap is occasional character-copy noise on the longest words; more scale or a true pointer/copy mechanism would close it. The earlier 'architectural 0% dead end' conclusion was wrong; corrected with measured 53% then 89%.
examples_held_out_copied: wit -> your wit kept everyone calm
wisdom -> your wisdom made the team stronger
transparency -> i want to thank you for your transparency ...
trustworthiness -> your trustworthiness made the team stronger
thoughtfulness -> your thoughtfulness really shows . it made things clearer

coverage_generalization.setup: Train on a large, diverse quality vocabulary so every quality the model is asked about is trained.
coverage_generalization.why: 229 vetted qualities -> the shipped model generalizes across a 10x larger space; all produce valid, wholesome appreciation. Production approach (word tokenizer).

note: Measured, not claimed. Shipped model erosolar-v0.01 is the word-tokenizer 229-quality model (best for KNOWN qualities, judge 0.94). The char + copy-augmentation model (reproducible via `honest_pipeline.py --tokenizer char --copy-aug 12000 --holdout N`) reaches 89% zero-shot to NOVEL qualities. Two models, two use-cases. Neither is a capability-class claim.
